CustomField.formula: IF(Expelled__c = true, "Utesluten", IF(StartDate__c > EndDate__c, "Makulerad", IF(StartDate__c > TODAY(), "Kommande", IF(EndDate__c < TODAY(), "Avslutad", IF(EndDate__c >= TODAY(), "Begärt utträde", IF(StartDate__c <= TODAY(), "Aktiv", "Ej medlem"))))))
CustomField.label: Status
